question: A developer plans to use the Text component on its pages. However, the out-of-the-box (OOTB) Text component does not allow authors to edit HTML source on component. How should the developer support HTML source editing?

Create a new clientlib to programmatically handle HTML source in authoring
Extend the OOTB Text component and enable the sourceedit Rich-Text Editor (RTE) plugin.

correct: Edit the OOTB Text component directly to enable sourceedit Rich-Text Editor (RTE) plugin.

question: An apparel retailer uses Adobe Lightroom and Photoshop for asset editing and building creatives. The retailer intends to purchase Adobe AEM to seamlessly collaborate on assets by managing renditions and smart cropping. What should the Business Practitioner recommend?
answers: Transfer creatives to a common cloud share location
Set up asset upload workflow to send assets to AEM
Manually transfer RAW files to AEM

question: A company wants to personalize the user experience by targeting marketing banners to users based on CRM data. The company also wants to simulate the user experience for personalized content to confirm the targeted content displays to the intended users. Which AEM functionality should the Business Practitioner recommend?
reason: ContextHub enables targeting and personalization by storing and managing contextual data such as CRM information and allows simulation of user contexts.

question: A customer's development team builds their new Single Page Application. The business owner wants the content editing to be done using AEM Core Components in their existing AEM 6.5 instance. What should the Business Practitioner recommend?
answers: Move to AEM as a Cloud Service to support Core Components
Use AEM Modernization Tool to convert to AEM Core Components
Map SPA Components to AEM Core Components
Open SPA pages using Developer Mode
correct: Map SPA Components to AEM Core Components
reason: Mapping SPA components to AEM Core Components enables content editing within AEM while maintaining the SPA architecture.

question: Developers made changes to a page. The client views the page but still sees the old version. However, when the client views the page in Incognito mode, the new page displays correctly. What is the solution to this problem?
answers: Check the page status and if necessary, the state of the replication queue
Clear the cache of the browser and access the page again
Clear the Dispatcher cache and access the page again
Contact your system administrator to see if there are issues with the replication queue
correct: Clear the cache of the browser and access the page again
reason: If the updated page appears in incognito mode but not in the normal browser session, the issue is typically caused by the browser cache.

question: A customer has an existing AEM 6.5 site that processes large volumes of asset renditions through the DAM Update Asset workflow. The current site's CPU and memory configuration has reached capacity to handle the volume. The forecast for next year is to significantly increase the volume of assets. The customer wants a scalable solution without increasing the on-prem costs. What should the Business Practitioner recommend?
answers: Switch to Assets as a Cloud Service to run on DAM Process Sub-Asset workflow
Switch to Assets as a Cloud Service and configure asset microservices
Increase the number of Author instances and optimize DAM Asset Update Workflow
Switch Assets to run DAM Update Asset workflow
correct: Switch to Assets as a Cloud Service and configure asset microservices
reason: Asset microservices in AEM as a Cloud Service offload asset processing to scalable cloud services.

question: In a media company, content authors need to structure and arrange their content as well as select how content is presented visually. What should the Business Practitioner recommend using?
reason: The Style System allows authors to apply predefined visual styles to components without modifying their content structure.

question: When a user requests a cacheable document from the AEM Dispatcher, what will the Dispatcher check to assess whether the document exists in the web server's file system? (Choose two)
answers: If the document is not cached, the Dispatcher requests the document from the AEM instance.
If the document is cached, the AEM Dispatcher requests the cached file after validation.
If the document is cached, the AEM Dispatcher returns the file from the CDN cache.
If the document is not cached, the Dispatcher returns a 404 error response.
correct: If the document is not cached, the Dispatcher requests the document from the AEM instance.
If the document is cached, the AEM Dispatcher requests the cached file after validation.
reason: Dispatcher checks the web server cache. If cached it validates and serves it; if not, it fetches it from the AEM publish instance.

question: A leading entertainment media company recently acquired a stock photography company. The stock photography company uses AEM for its enterprise digital asset management. The media company decides to refresh and add photos to its website from the stock photography digital asset library. Sites and Assets must be integrated so that authors can seamlessly search, browse, and embed assets. What feature should the Business Practitioner recommend?
reason: Connected Assets allows one AEM instance to access assets stored in another AEM instance seamlessly.

question: Which two entities does the MSM Rollout action keep in sync? (Choose two)
reason: MSM rollout synchronizes content between blueprint sources and their derived copies such as language copies.

question: Which role is responsible for overseeing the project infrastructure?
reason: DevOps engineers manage infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, deployments, and operational environments.

question: A company plans to develop a set of pages with the same design and structure. The only difference between the pages is the content inside the body. What is the best approach to develop the pages?
answers: Create a page template and put the rich-text editor (RTE) in the body.
Use the out-of-the-box Reference component to allow freedom in content editing.
Create a page template for all pages with a layout container in the body.
Create a specific page template for each page with associated components in each body.
correct: Create a page template for all pages with a layout container in the body.
reason: Using a single editable template with a layout container enables reuse of structure while allowing authors to manage content.

question: Where should a customer configure settings to invalidate the live site cache based on the folder hierarchy level?
reason: Cache invalidation and rules for cache structure are configured in the Dispatcher layer.

question: An AEM front end developer is building a hero component that consists of an image and a call-to-action button. The developer experiences challenges building a responsive layout of the button for certain types of heights based on the wireframe provided. What should the Business Practitioner do?
answers: Make edits to the wireframe and request developer to fix
Identify gap in wireframe and escalate to the AEM architect to fix
Identify gap in wireframe and escalate to the design team to fix
Request AEM developer to build a new mobile dedicated version of component
correct: Identify gap in wireframe and escalate to the design team to fix
reason: If the issue comes from design specifications such as the wireframe, it should be escalated to the design team.

question: An end user receives the following error when trying to load a page on the live site: java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError: Could not initialize class com.foo.bar.java. How should a Business Practitioner categorize this error during the initial triage?
reason: A Java NoClassDefFoundError indicates a code or dependency issue introduced during development.

question: A customer decides to use AEM as a Cloud Service to host its new websites. The Business Practitioner is responsible for first-time setup for new users and groups for this website. Which two steps should be performed to meet this requirement? (Choose two)
answers: Apply AEM Permissions and Privileges for new users
Set up local AEM Groups for new users
Add new AEM Users to Admin Console
Map IMS groups to local AEM groups
correct: Set up local AEM Groups for new users
Map IMS groups to local AEM groups
reason: In AEM as a Cloud Service, IMS groups are mapped to local AEM groups for permissions management.

question: A template author wants to modify the default layout for all existing product pages. If the original editable template is modified, what happens?
answers: All existing product pages are changed to reflect the change in initial content excluding the structure
All existing product pages are changed to reflect the change including the initial content and structure of the template
All existing product pages are changed to reflect the change in structure excluding the initial content
No existing product pages are changed
correct: All existing product pages are changed to reflect the change in structure excluding the initial content
reason: Editable template structure updates propagate to existing pages, while initial content does not change.

question: Which AEM solution can leverage artificial intelligence to automatically apply metadata?
reason: AEM Assets uses Adobe Sensei to automatically apply metadata through Smart Tags.

question: A client has approached you and said that their renditions are not appearing for an asset recently uploaded. As an author, how would you troubleshoot this issue?
answers: Check the properties of the asset
reason: Rendition generation is handled by workflows such as DAM Update Asset. Failures there prevent renditions.

question: A customer has marketing-related digital assets distributed across the AEM Assets/DAM location. To better operate, the customer needs to create a grouping of all assets under a specific 'marketing' category that are contained in various locations across the AEM Assets/DAM. What should the Business Practitioner use?
reason: Smart Collections dynamically group assets based on search criteria such as tags or metadata.

question: A customer launches a new AEM Community site. Negative feedback is increasing quickly in the marketing forum sections. The Business Practitioner needs to recommend an Administration section to manage this situation. What should the Business Practitioner recommend to modify?
reason: Pre-moderation ensures posts are reviewed before appearing publicly.

question: What is the purpose of AEM Screens?
answers: To share assets across different devices
To display content via different types of devices
correct: To display content via different types of devices
reason: AEM Screens is used for digital signage across different devices.

question: A specific user is encountering an error while editing a page that other authors have not reported. How would you troubleshoot the problem using AEM?
answers: Use AEM Screens for a screenshare session
Impersonate as the user reporting the issue
correct: Impersonate as the user reporting the issue
reason: Impersonation allows reproducing issues specific to a user's permissions or environment.

question: What can be done to obtain a better bounce rate for your site? (Choose two)
answers: Use AEM Asset Insights to capture activity details and make data-driven changes to your landing page
Run reports on AEM Communities to get user sentiment from social media
Use AEM Projects to communicate with your end-users
Use Adobe Target A/B testing to determine the best performing version of your pages
correct: Use AEM Asset Insights to capture activity details and make data-driven changes to your landing page
Use Adobe Target A/B testing to determine the best performing version of your pages
reason: Analytics insights and A/B testing help optimize landing pages and reduce bounce rates.

question: A manager wishes to keep track of complete and incomplete tasks related to the creation of a new site. Which feature can do this?
reason: AEM Projects manages teams, tasks, and resources for projects.

question: To improve user experience across their website, a marketing team acquired a package with custom components from a third-party vendor. After the package installation, the new component content was not translated. The company uses machine translation. What should the Business Practitioner do?
answers: Contact the translation vendor to add the new components
Create the new Translation Cloud Services Configurations
Set up translation rules for the new components
Import the new components to a translation project to let the translation engine recognize them
correct: Set up translation rules for the new components
reason: Translation rules define which component properties should be translated.

question: The content and code of a newly developed website is deployed correctly to the AEM publish instance. While trying to render a non-protected page on AEM publish instance, the page does not render. The same page renders correctly after login into AEM Publish instance as an administrative user. Which user's permissions should the Business Practitioner modify to resolve this issue?
reason: Public pages require permissions for the anonymous user on publish.

question: A customer wants to restrict different sections of live site pages to different sets of groups. What should a Business Practitioner recommend to accomplish this?
answers: Restrict access to a specific team for an AEM Project
Restrict access by using closed user groups
Restrict access to content on an author server
correct: Restrict access by using closed user groups
reason: Closed User Groups restrict content access to specific authenticated users.

question: A Business Practitioner was working on Security > User tools in AEM author instance and accidentally deleted the anonymous user. This caused the author instance to malfunction. What should the Business Practitioner do?
reason: Restarting the instance restores the default anonymous user configuration.

question: If a client wants to add a Facebook pixel or analytics tracking, what option do you recommend?
answers: Have a developer add it to a page component
Add a custom script with Adobe Target
Use a tag management tool such as Adobe Launch
correct: Use a tag management tool such as Adobe Launch
reason: Tag management systems allow marketing teams to manage tracking scripts without code changes.

question: Your company is launching a website with customers from around the world. What capabilities of AEM Sites would allow you to make the content more relevant to the largest amount of customers? (Choose two)
reason: Translation Framework supports multilingual content and MSM enables regional variations.

question: A page is created to present personalized experiences using the AEM targeting mode. A targeted custom offer is doing well and needs to be shown on additional pages with personalized experiences. What should the Business Practitioner recommend?
answers: Save offer as content fragment variation
Save offer to an offer library
Copy offer to a content fragment
correct: Save offer to an offer library
reason: Offers stored in the offer library can be reused across multiple personalized experiences.

question: A customer is interested in using live copy experience fragment variations. Changes to the master variation should trigger automatic updates to live copy variations excluding references. Which rollout configuration should the Business Practitioner recommend?
reason: Shallow rollout pushes content changes but excludes references.

question: The company has many content authors who are responsible for creating and maintaining both page and experience fragment content. Content authors want to be able to filter the view to show all of their content. What should the Business Practitioner recommend changing?
reason: The Sites search rail allows filtering and searching content within the Sites console.

question: A company is planning to gradually launch a microsite in five new languages using human translation. The budget for translation is limited this year. The project manager needs to: plan translation in small batches, determine how to evaluate cost for each translation batch, and leave the rest for next year. What should the Business Practitioner recommend?
answers: Request scope for a translation job before sending the content for translation
Run the Translation Prepare workflow specifying the budget before sending the content
Reject the translation upon receipt if the bill exceeds the budget
Uncheck Auto Execute Translation option for Translation Cloud Services configuration
correct: Request scope for a translation job before sending the content for translation
reason: Requesting scope allows estimating translation cost before sending content.

question: An author wants to understand the article page performance and modify it based on last week's change performance. This customer has integrated Analytics, AEM, and Target. What should the Business Practitioner recommend the author use?
reason: Page Performance in AEM Sites provides analytics metrics such as page views, unique visitors, and engagement.

question: Which role is responsible for gathering and analyzing high-level requirements, then transforming the requirements into specifications?
reason: Business Analysts gather business requirements and translate them into functional specifications.

question: Users report that all recent page edits made are not present on the publish instance. What should the Business Practitioner check?
reason: Replication agents manage the publishing process from author to publish. If they fail, changes will not appear on publish.

question: The customer wants to quickly set up a small website with the following requirements: Use only out-of-the-box components, not manage AEM servers, and have the ability to auto-scale up/down based on traffic patterns. Which deployment strategy should the Business Practitioner recommend?
reason: AEM as a Cloud Service provides automatic scaling and removes the need for server management.

question: A customer is running on AEM 6.2 and uses classic UI and static templates. Sponsors are updated to core components, and multiple benefits offered in AEM 6.5. Sponsors are interested to see a proof of concept of migrating existing components. What should the Business Practitioner recommend?
answers: Extend existing components to support new features
Develop new core components and dynamic templates
reason: AEM Modernization Tools help migrate legacy components and templates to modern Core Components.

question: Which capability in AEM as a Cloud Service should a Business Practitioner use for scalable seamless processing of assets?
reason: Asset Microservices provide scalable asset processing in AEM as a Cloud Service.

question: A company wants to survey their customers by having them fill in details on the current page and submit the information. The company recently upgraded from AEM 6.2 to AEM 6.5. Which component should be used?
reason: Form Button components allow users to submit form data in AEM forms.

question: Which item is required in order for authors to be able to publish experience fragments to Adobe Target?
answers: It works out of the box
reason: Experience Fragments must be connected to Adobe Target through a cloud configuration.

question: The team wants to develop new page layouts and designs, use new product imagery, and deliver personalized offers. The Business Practitioner needs to identify groups to work with to build out the necessary components and page layouts. Which groups should the Business Practitioner identify?
answers: AEM architect, Site Operations team, AEM Development team
Creative design studio, Marketing business team, DAM Administrator
Creative design studio, AEM architect, AEM Development team
correct: Creative design studio, Marketing business team, DAM Administrator
reason: Design, marketing, and asset management teams collaborate to produce layouts, imagery, and marketing experiences.

question: A customer wants to improve search capability by adding additional information about assets when they are uploaded. What should a Business Practitioner recommend to accomplish this?
reason: Smart Content Services automatically add metadata tags to assets to improve searchability.

question: A content author needs help to create a copy of an experience fragment that will have unique text. What should be created?
reason: Experience Fragments can be reused and customized through variations or building blocks.

question: Before a customer launches offers on their website, the legal team needs to view the final versions. What should the Business Practitioner recommend?
answers: The legal team should use the 'Request launch' workflow.
Extend the 'Publish Example' workflow assigning the first step to the legal team.
Create a new workflow that assigns the last step to the legal team.
The legal team should use the 'Request to complete move operation' workflow.
correct: Create a new workflow that assigns the last step to the legal team.
reason: Custom workflows allow adding approval steps such as legal review before publishing.
